item.description: The Pentagon says that the U.S. military has launched retaliatory strikes on Iran after a commercial vessel was hit in the Strait of Hormuz. Trump had teased a potential retaliation against Iran while speaking to reporters at the White House, just hours after claiming that Iran had violated the ceasefire agreement signed last week.

media:content.media:title: U.S. strikes Iran after attack on commercial vessel in Strait of Hormuz
media:content.media:description: The Pentagon says that the U.S. military has launched retaliatory strikes on Iran after a commercial vessel was hit in the Strait of Hormuz. Trump had teased a potential retaliation against Iran while speaking to reporters at the White House, just hours after claiming that Iran had violated the ceasefire agreement signed last week.

item.title: U.S. strikes Iran after attack on commercial vessel in Strait of Hormuz

item.dc:creator: Ana Vanessa Herrero
Nicole Acevedo
Geraldine Cols Azócar
item.description: As thousands are trapped in the rubble and with time running out, some families facing the unimaginable got the outcome they were desperately hoping for.

media:content.media:text: 4-year-old kid rescued.
media:content.media:description: 4-year-old trapped for over 24 hours rescued José Alberto Gallipoli shared video of the rescue of his 4-year-old grandson in La Guaira, where he and his parents had been trapped in their apartment for more than 24 hours until they were rescued. Gallipoli's son and wife had been able to let others know they were okay inside as Gallipolli pleaded for their rescue.

media:content.media:credit: Ana Vanessa Herrero for NBC News
media:content.media:text: People camp in an open space in La Guaira, Venezuela.
media:content.media:description: People camp in an open space in La Guaira, Venezuela.

media:content.media:text: A view of the destroyed building.
media:content.media:description: The building where Gallipoli's son and wife were trapped. They had been able to let others know they were OK inside as Gallipolli pleaded for their rescue.

media:content.media:text: 4-year-old trapped for over 24 hours rescued José Alberto Gallipoli shared video of the rescue of his 4-year-old grandson in La Guaira, where he and his parents had been trapped in their apartment for more than 24 hours until they were rescued. Gallipoli's son and wife had been able to let others know they were okay inside as Gallipolli pleaded for their rescue.
media:content.media:description: The building where Gallipoli's son and wife were trapped.

media:content.media:credit: Ana Vanessa Herrero for NBC News
media:content.media:text: A destroyed building in La Guaira, Venezuela.
media:content.media:description: Venezuela's acting President Delcy Rodríguez said La Guaira has been militarized to provide additional help.

item.title: Agony, then ‘a miracle’: Venezuelan families describe reuniting with rescued loved ones

item.dc:creator: Joelle Gross
Jiachuan Wu
Ashley Mowreader
Joe Murphy
item.description: NBC News is tracking French star Kylian Mbappé and Argentine legend Lionel Messi as they battle for the all-time FIFA World Cup scoring record.

media:content.media:text: Kylian Mbappe of France and Lionel Messi of Argentina during the 2026 World Cup.
media:content.media:description: Kylian Mbappe of France and Lionel Messi of Argentina celebrate goals during the 2026 World Cup.

item.title: Gooooooooals: Tracking Mbappé and Messi’s battle for the all-time World Cup scoring record

item.dc:creator: Mark Hodge
item.description: The United States lost last night, 3-2, on a late goal by Turkey. But the biggest development? Star Christian Pulisic returned from injury and showed he was healthy in time for the knockout stage.

media:content.media:text: U.S. forward Christian Pulisic during a World Cup match against Turkey on June 25, 2026.
media:content.media:description: U.S. forward Christian Pulisic during last night's match against Turkey.

media:content.media:text: Sebastian Berhalter, left, and Auston Trusty of the U.S. react after their loss in a World Cup match against Turkey on June 25, 2026.
media:content.media:description: U.S. forward Christian Pulisic during last night's match against Turkey.

media:content.media:text: Erling Haaland of Norway during their match against Senegal.
media:content.media:description: U.S. forward Christian Pulisic during last night's match against Turkey.

media:content.media:text: SOCCER: JUN 22 FIFA World Cup 26 Group I - France vs Iraq
media:content.media:description: U.S. forward Christian Pulisic during last night's match against Turkey.

item.title: From The Sports Desk: The U.S. lost, but also saw return of star Christian Pulisic

item.dc:creator: Andrew Greif
item.description: The U.S. men’s national team lost 3-2 to Turkey, but advances to face Bosnia and Herzegovina in the round of 32 with Christian Pulisic healthy.

media:content.media:text: Los Angeles WCup Soccer Reaction
media:content.media:description: Team USA fans watch the match against Turkey at Union Station in Los Angeles on June 25, 2026.

media:content.media:text: Kaan Ayhan. Auston Trusty,Mark McKenzie,Miles Robinson
media:content.media:description: Turkey's Kaan Ayhan scores the winner against the U.S. in Inglewood, Calif., on Thursday.

media:content.media:text: Türkiye v USA: Group D - FIFA World Cup 2026
media:content.media:description: Christian Pulisic during last night's Group D match.

item.title: The U.S. can shrug off its last-gasp loss to Turkey. Now the stakes go up.

item.description: En una salida defensiva de Irak, Ismaila Sarr aprovechá el error tras el pase de Camara para ampliar la ventaja en el segundo tiempo. El equipo senegalés aprovecha los desaciertos iraquíes para asegurar el partido.

media:content.media:title: Sarr marca el segundo para Senegal tras error en la salida de Irak
media:content.media:description: En una salida defensiva de Irak, Ismaila Sarr aprovechá el error tras el pase de Camara para ampliar la ventaja en el segundo tiempo. El equipo senegalés aprovecha los desaciertos iraquíes para asegurar el partido.

item.title: Sarr marca el segundo para Senegal tras error en la salida de Irak

item.description: Los noruegos tuvieron la oportunidad de acortar distancias, pero el arquero del AC Milan respondió a la altura.

media:content.media:title: Mike Maignan le ataja un penal a Jørgen Strand Larsen y salva a Francia
media:content.media:description: Los noruegos tuvieron la oportunidad de acortar distancias, pero el arquero del AC Milan respondió a la altura.

item.title: Mike Maignan le ataja un penal a Jørgen Strand Larsen y salva a Francia

item.description: Tres goles de manera contundente del jugador del Paris Saint-Germain, para colocar el 3-1 de una Selección de Francia que luce imparable.

media:content.media:title: Hat-Trick de Ousmane Dembélé: El Balón de Oro le roba el protagonismo a Mbappé
media:content.media:description: Tres goles de manera contundente del jugador del Paris Saint-Germain, para colocar el 3-1 de una Selección de Francia que luce imparable.

item.title: Hat-Trick de Ousmane Dembélé: El Balón de Oro le roba el protagonismo a Mbappé

item.description: Ousmane Dembélé pone a Francia arriba en el marcador con dos golazos que encienden al público francés. En las bancas se observa el contraste entre la alegría francesa y la frustración noruega.

media:content.media:title: Dembélé hace enloquecer a todo el estadio y los fans se entregan al grito del gol
media:content.media:description: Ousmane Dembélé pone a Francia arriba en el marcador con dos golazos que encienden al público francés. En las bancas se observa el contraste entre la alegría francesa y la frustración noruega.

item.title: Dembélé hace enloquecer a todo el estadio y los fans se entregan al grito del gol

item.description: Minutos antes Dembélé anotó el 2-0, pero el equipo de Noruega aprovechó un descuido para descontar en el último partido de la Fase de Grupos.

media:content.media:title: Thelo Aasgaard le devuelve la esperanza a Noruega con el 1-2 ante Francia
media:content.media:description: Minutos antes Dembélé anotó el 2-0, pero el equipo de Noruega aprovechó un descuido para descontar en el último partido de la Fase de Grupos.

item.title: Thelo Aasgaard le devuelve la esperanza a Noruega con el 1-2 ante Francia

item.description: Apareció una vez más el vigente Balón de Oro para ampliar la ventaja con otra auténtica obra de arte.

media:content.media:title: Doblete de golazos para Ousmane Dembélé: Francia lo gana 0-2 a Noruega
media:content.media:description: Apareció una vez más el vigente Balón de Oro para ampliar la ventaja con otra auténtica obra de arte.

item.title: Doblete de golazos para Ousmane Dembélé: Francia lo gana 0-2 a Noruega

item.description: El Balón de Oro apareció para abrir el marcador en el partido ante Noruega por el cierre de la Fase de Grupos del Mundial 2026.

media:content.media:title: ¡BOMBAZO! Ousmane Dembélé marca el 0-1 para Francia con un disparo imparable
media:content.media:description: El Balón de Oro apareció para abrir el marcador en el partido ante Noruega por el cierre de la Fase de Grupos del Mundial 2026.

item.title: ¡BOMBAZO! Ousmane Dembélé marca el 0-1 para Francia con un disparo imparable

item.description: Marcelo Bielsa y varios futbolistas de Uruguay explican cómo el trabajo colectivo, la atención a los detalles y la convicción en una idea de juego han fortalecido a la Celeste en el Mundial FIFA 2026.

media:content.media:title: Marcelo Bielsa revela la esencia de la selección de Uruguay | Vive el Mundial
media:content.media:description: Marcelo Bielsa y varios futbolistas de Uruguay explican cómo el trabajo colectivo, la atención a los detalles y la convicción en una idea de juego han fortalecido a la Celeste en el Mundial FIFA 2026.

item.title: Marcelo Bielsa revela la esencia de la selección de Uruguay | Vive el Mundial

item.description: Luego de un tiro de Esquina, Camara asiste para que Seck la pique de cabeza en el área de Irak y terminé convirtiéndose en el primer tanto para Senegal, apenas comenzando el juego.

media:content.media:title: Abdoulaye Seck marca el primero para Senegal de cabeza
media:content.media:description: Luego de un tiro de Esquina, Camara asiste para que Seck la pique de cabeza en el área de Irak y terminé convirtiéndose en el primer tanto para Senegal, apenas comenzando el juego.

item.title: Abdoulaye Seck marca el primero para Senegal de cabeza

item.description: Luis de la Fuente explica por qué prioriza el lado humano por encima de cualquier sistema de juego. El seleccionador español asegura que el respeto, el compromiso y el trabajo constante son la base del éxito de La Roja.

media:content.media:title: De la Fuente revela la clave del éxito de España | Vive el Mundial
media:content.media:description: Luis de la Fuente explica por qué prioriza el lado humano por encima de cualquier sistema de juego. El seleccionador español asegura que el respeto, el compromiso y el trabajo constante son la base del éxito de La Roja.

item.title: De la Fuente revela la clave del éxito de España | Vive el Mundial

item.description: France is broiling under the largest heat alert ever issued, as authorities grapple with an unrelenting and deadly heatwave. Red alerts are also in place across Europe, from Spain to the U.K. NBC’s Daniele Hamamdjian reports for TODAY.

media:content.media:title: France Records Hottest Day Ever as Europe Swelters in Heatwave
media:content.media:description: France is broiling under the largest heat alert ever issued, as authorities grapple with an unrelenting and deadly heatwave. Red alerts are also in place across Europe, from Spain to the U.K. NBC’s Daniele Hamamdjian reports for TODAY.

item.title: France Records Hottest Day Ever as Europe Swelters in Heatwave

item.description: After two days of deliberations, a federal judge declared a mistrial in the case concerning the origin of the devastating January 2025 fires in Los Angeles. NBC News' Misty Marris explains how the judge reached the mistrial verdict.

media:content.media:title: Mistrial declared in trial over deadly Palisades Fire
media:content.media:description: After two days of deliberations, a federal judge declared a mistrial in the case concerning the origin of the devastating January 2025 fires in Los Angeles. NBC News' Misty Marris explains how the judge reached the mistrial verdict.

item.title: Mistrial declared in trial over deadly Palisades Fire

item.dc:creator: Suzy Khimm
item.description: Researchers analyzed millions of electronic health records and found a major difference between states that greenlit sports gambling and those that didn’t.
item.title: Gambling disorder diagnoses spike in states that legalized sports betting, study shows

item.dc:creator: Zoe Malin
item.description: It’s the final day of Amazon Prime Day 2026, and we’re updating our list of editor-approved deals live. Shop tech, beauty, kitchen and more before the sale ends.
item.title: Prime Day discounts end tonight: Shop these 399+ worth-it deals before they’re over from Apple, Le Creuset, Tarte and more

item.description: A major Supreme Court ruling today came down in favor of President Trump's immigration policies, paving the way for the administration to strip hundreds of thousands of Haitian and Syrian refugees of deportation protections. NBC News’ Laura Jarrett reports.

media:content.media:title: Supreme Court allows Trump admin to remove deportation protections from thousands
media:content.media:description: A major Supreme Court ruling today came down in favor of President Trump's immigration policies, paving the way for the administration to strip hundreds of thousands of Haitian and Syrian refugees of deportation protections. NBC News’ Laura Jarrett reports.

item.title: Supreme Court allows Trump admin to remove deportation protections from thousands

item.description: In our series “The Cost of Denial”, Erin McLaughlin reports on the military family fighting to get their son coverage for the autism therapy that could help him live a more independent life.

media:content.media:title: Family fights for coverage of autism therapy
media:content.media:description: In our series “The Cost of Denial”, Erin McLaughlin reports on the military family fighting to get their son coverage for the autism therapy that could help him live a more independent life.

item.title: Family fights for coverage of autism therapy

item.dc:creator: Ben Kamisar
Annelise Hanson
item.description: The NBC News poll asked American adults which historical event they thought was the country’s biggest accomplishment in its 250 years.

media:content.media:text: Buzz Aldrin Poses next To The U.S. flag On Moon
media:content.media:description: Astronaut Edwin "Buzz" Aldrin on July 20, 1969, during the Apollo 11 mission to the moon.

media:content.media:text: A word cloud of responses to a poll question about what Americans think the country's greatest achievement has been.
media:content.media:description: Astronaut Edwin "Buzz" Aldrin on July 20, 1969, during the Apollo 11 mission to the moon.

item.title: Civil rights, moon landings and war wins: What Americans see as the country’s greatest achievements

item.dc:creator: Tim Rohan
item.description: George Weah won the Ballon d’Or in 1995 and is considered one of the best soccer players of his generation. Now, his son is carving his own path on the U.S. men’s national team.

media:content.media:text: United States Portraits - FIFA World Cup 2026
media:content.media:description: Tim Weah in Laguna Niguel, Calif., on June 8.

media:content.media:text: Timothy Weah of United States
media:content.media:description: Tim Weah in Laguna Niguel, Calif., on June 8.

media:content.media:text: George Weah holding the Ballon D'Or in 1995; Timothy Weah holding the Coppa Italia in 2024.
media:content.media:description: Tim Weah in Laguna Niguel, Calif., on June 8.

media:content.media:text: On-field action during World Cup Qatar 2022.
media:content.media:description: Tim Weah in Laguna Niguel, Calif., on June 8.

media:content.media:text: George Weah, President of Liberia
media:content.media:description: Tim Weah in Laguna Niguel, Calif., on June 8.

item.title: Out from his father’s shadow, Tim Weah is carving his own path with the U.S.

item.description: Fresh off the NBA Finals, teams are preparing for the 2026 draft where fresh talent will get to shine. NBC News' Marquis Francis reports on what to expect and how the Giannis Antetokounmpo trade is shaking up the league.

media:content.media:title: Game on: NBA prepares for 2026 draft
media:content.media:description: Fresh off the NBA Finals, teams are preparing for the 2026 draft where fresh talent will get to shine. NBC News' Marquis Francis reports on what to expect and how the Giannis Antetokounmpo trade is shaking up the league.

item.title: Game on: NBA prepares for 2026 draft

item.dc:creator: Mirna Alsharif
item.description: A Michigan couple have been charged with murder in connection with the death of their 7-year-old son, who was 255 pounds when he died, according to Genesee County Prosecutor David Leyton

media:content.media:text: Floyd J. McCree Courts and Human Services Center
media:content.media:description: Floyd J. McCree Courts and Human Services Center

item.title: Michigan parents charged with murder after 7-year-old son dies weighing 255 pounds
